papers.title_en: MedSAM2-CXR: A Box-Latent Framework for Chest X-ray Classification and Report Generation
papers.tldr: 针对日本等地区放射科医生短缺与胸部X光片（CXR）需求巨大的矛盾，本文提出了MedSAM2-CXR框架。该框架采用Box-Latent架构，能够同时处理CXR的分类任务和自动报告生成。通过结合SAM2的分割能力与潜在表示学习，该方法显著提升了医学影像分析的效率和准确性，为缓解医疗资源压力提供了技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Who is affected In Japan, approximately 100 million chest radiographs(CXRs) are acquired annually, while only about 7,000 board-certified diagnosticradiologists practice nationwide (Japan Radiological Society workforce statistics; …

papers.title_en: CFCM-Gen: Cross-modal Feature Co-optimization Mechanism for 3D Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 针对3D放射影像报告生成中高维数据复杂性带来的挑战，本文提出了CFCM-Gen框架。该框架引入了跨模态特征协同优化机制，旨在通过增强视觉特征与文本描述之间的对齐与交互，提高报告生成的准确性和临床相关性，为自动化3D医疗诊断提供了有效的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: 3D medical imaging provides rich volumetric information and plays a critical role indisease diagnosis, however, due to the high-dimensional complexity of 3D radiologyimages, automatically generating radiology reports remains a challenging task …

papers.title_en: Deep Learning for Survival Prediction in Glioblastoma: Time-dependent Model Interpretability Using MRI, Clinical, and Molecular Data
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）预后预测的挑战，开发了一种整合术前MRI影像、临床及分子数据的多模态深度学习模型。该模型不仅提高了生存预测的准确性，还引入了时间依赖的可解释性分析，揭示了不同特征在不同生存阶段的影响力。通过多中心回顾性研究验证，该方法为GBM的精准医疗和临床决策提供了更具透明度和可靠性的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To develop a multimodal model for survival prediction and time-dependentmodel interpretability in glioblastoma by integrating preoperative MRI with clinicaland molecular variables. Materials and Methods This retrospective multicenter study …

papers.title_en: Two-staged CT-based radiomics model in characterising early-stage ovarian carcinoma and benign ovarian masses
papers.tldr: 针对CT检测到的卵巢肿块在影像特征、生物标志物及临床表现上存在重叠且不可靠的挑战，本研究提出了一种基于CT影像组学的两阶段模型。该模型旨在准确区分早期卵巢癌与良性卵巢肿块，通过提取高维影像特征并进行分阶段分析，显著提升了早期卵巢癌的诊断效能，为临床决策提供了可靠的无创辅助工具。
papers.abstract_en: Background Characterisation of CT detected ovarian masses is challenging withoverlapping imaging features, unreliable biomarker or clinical presentation. Weproposed a two-staged CT-based radiomics model to identify early-stage ovarian …

papers.title_en: Multimodal Fusion Architectures for Clinical Vision Language Models: A Comprehensive Analysis of Integration Strategies and Performance Trade-Offs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床视觉语言模型（VLM）中的多模态融合架构进行了系统性分析。由于医疗决策高度依赖影像、病理报告及电子健康记录等多源数据，本文深入探讨了不同的集成策略及其在性能与效率之间的权衡。通过对比多种融合模型，为临床场景下多模态数据的有效整合提供了全面的技术指导和性能评估，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: The combination of medical imaging, pathology reports, EHR, and radiologicalstories is the keystone of clinical decision-making. This paper provides a systematicanalysis of multimodal fusion models on clinical Vision-language Models (VLM) …

papers.title_en: QPath: A Question-Aware Multi-Resolution Vision Language Framework for Computational Pathology
papers.tldr: 针对现有病理视觉问答（VQA）模型仅依赖单分辨率图像分析而忽略跨尺度信息的局限性，本文提出了QPath框架。该框架引入了问题感知的多分辨率机制，能够根据查询内容动态提取并融合不同尺度的病理特征。实验表明，QPath在处理复杂病理图像咨询时表现优异，显著提升了模型对病理细节的感知能力和诊断准确性，为计算病理学领域的多模态大模型研究提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Computational pathology has recently advanced through the use of multimodal largelanguage models (MLLMs) for visual question answering (VQA). However, mostexisting approaches rely on single-resolution analysis of pathology images, limiting …

papers.title_en: Disease Risk Prediction Using Structured EHR Data: Can Generalist Large Language Models Match Specialized Clinical Foundation Models? A Comparative …
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了通用大语言模型（LLMs）在利用结构化电子健康档案（EHR）进行疾病风险预测时，是否能达到专用临床基础模型（CFMs）的性能水平。通过在多种临床预测任务中对比通用LLMs与在海量医疗数据上预训练的CFMs，研究分析了两者在处理异构临床数据时的表现差异。该研究为医疗AI领域中模型架构的选择提供了实证依据，并探讨了通用模型在临床决策支持中的潜力与局限。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Electronic health records (EHRs) with clinical decision support tools arenow ubiquitous in healthcare organizations. Clinical foundation models (CFMs)pretrained on large-scale, heterogeneous structured EHR data have emerged as a …

papers.title_en: SVCF: Enabling Zero-Shot Correction of Reasoning Steps in Multi-Modal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 随着多模态大语言模型（MLLM）处理的任务日益复杂，推理过程中的逻辑错误累积成为提升性能的瓶颈。本文提出了SVCF框架，旨在实现推理步骤的零样本纠错。该方法通过引入视觉与认知反馈机制，在无需额外训练或微调的情况下，能够自动识别并修正多模态推理路径中的偏差。实验证明，SVCF显著提升了模型在复杂推理任务中的准确性，为增强MLLM的可靠性提供了高效的新方案。
papers.abstract_en: The latest advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) havedemonstrated remarkable performance in complex reasoning tasks. However, withthe increasing complexity of problems and the diversification of modalities, MLLMs …

papers.title_en: Game-Theoretic Insights into Multi-Agent LLM Debate for Enhanced Clinical Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床问答中大语言模型可靠性不足的问题，探讨了多智能体辩论（MAD）机制。通过引入博弈论视角，让多个LLM智能体相互评价并整合答案，旨在通过群体智能提升决策质量。研究证明了MAD能有效增强临床问答的准确性与鲁棒性，为构建更可靠的医疗AI辅助系统提供了重要的理论支持与实践方案。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) have advanced in medical question answering, yetensuring reliability remains challenging. We study multi-agent debate (MAD), wheremultiple LLM agents critique and aggregate each other's answers. Our game …

papers.title_en: Multimodal Learning with Privileged Report Supervision for Generalizable Tuberculosis Detection on Chest Radiographs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X光结核病检测，提出了一种基于特权报告监督的多模态学习框架。针对传统模型在处理合成报告时易产生幻觉及推理受限的问题，该方法在训练时结合临床报告提供丰富的语义监督，而在推理阶段仅依赖图像输入。实验证明，该方法显著提升了模型在不同数据集上的泛化性能，为构建实用且可靠的医疗AI诊断系统提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal learning using images and associated clinical text offers richer semanticsupervision for medical AI. However, models trained with synthetic reports riskhallucination, and conventional multimodal tuberculosis (TB) systems are impractical …

papers.title_en: Weakly Supervised Medical Image Segmentation with Feature Reference Enhanced Prompt
papers.tldr: 本研究针对弱监督医学图像分割中伪标签噪声大、不可靠的问题，提出了一种基于特征参考增强提示的方法。该方法利用Segment Anything Model (SAM) 强大的分割能力，通过引入特征参考机制来优化提示生成，从而克服了传统弱监督学习对高质量标注的依赖。实验证明，该方法能显著提升分割精度，为医疗影像的自动化标注与分析提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Weakly supervised learning often relies on pseudo-labeling techniques to providesupervision, but the generated pseudo labels are inherently noisy and unreliable.Although the Segment Anything Model (SAM) is capable of producing high-quality …

papers.title_en: SpotSound: Enhancing Large Audio-Language Models with Fine-Grained Temporal Grounding
papers.tldr: 针对大型音频语言模型（ALM）在长音频中精确定位事件发生时间（时间定位）能力不足的问题，本文提出了 SpotSound。该方法通过增强模型的细粒度时间感知能力，解决了现有模型在整体理解上表现出色但在局部定位上不可靠的缺陷，显著提升了 ALM 在复杂音频场景下的时间定位精度和可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Large Audio-Language Models (ALMs) have recently demonstrated remarkablecapabilities in holistic audio understanding, yet they remain unreliable for temporalgrounding, ie, the task of pinpointing exactly when an event occurs within long-form …

papers.title_en: CLIP Architecture for Abdominal CT Image-Text Alignment and Zero-Shot Learning: Investigating Batch Composition and Data Scaling
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在腹部CT图像与报告对齐中，CLIP架构的对比学习效果。研究重点分析了训练批次组成和数据规模对3D医学图像表征学习及零样本诊断能力的影响。通过优化视觉-语言模型，旨在提升模型在缺乏标注数据情况下的临床诊断性能，为医学影像的零样本学习提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models trained with contrastive learning on paired medical imagesand reports show strong zero-shot diagnostic capabilities, yet the effect of trainingbatch composition on learned representations remains unexplored for 3D medical …

papers.title_en: SSL-R1: Self-Supervised Visual Reinforcement Post-Training for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在推理能力提升中过度依赖语言先验和昂贵人工标注的问题，提出了SSL-R1。该方法通过自监督视觉强化学习后训练，利用可验证奖励机制，在无需大规模人工标注的情况下，显著增强了模型在视觉推理任务中的表现，为构建更具自主学习能力的MLLM提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated thegreat potential of enhancing the reasoning abilities in multimodal large languagemodels (MLLMs). However, the reliance on language-centric priors and expensive …

papers.title_en: SycoPhantasy: Quantifying Sycophancy and Hallucination in Small Open Weight VLMs for Vision-Language Scoring of Fantasy Characters
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了小型开源视觉语言模型（VLM）在评估奇幻角色图像与文本描述一致性时的可靠性。通过提出 SycoPhantasy 框架，作者量化分析了模型在评分过程中表现出的“谄媚”（盲目顺从用户偏好）和“幻觉”（虚构图像特征）现象。研究填补了 VLM 作为自动评估器在细粒度图像理解任务中鲁棒性研究的空白，为构建更公正、准确的视觉语言评分系统提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as evaluators in tasksrequiring nuanced image understanding, yet their reliability in scoring alignmentbetween images and text descriptions remains underexplored. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
papers.tldr: Marco-MoE 是一系列开源的多语言稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型。该研究针对多语言处理需求，通过高效的“上循环”技术，构建了极高稀疏度的模型架构，每个输入 token 仅激活约 5% 的参数。这一设计在保持强大性能的同时，显著降低了推理计算开销，为开源社区提供了高效的多语言大模型方案。
papers.abstract_en: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts(MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\%of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined …

papers.title_en: Auditing Frontier Vision-Language Models for Trustworthy Medical VQA: Grounding Failures, Format Collapse, and Domain Adaptation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对前沿视觉语言模型（VLM）在医疗视觉问答（VQA）任务中的可靠性进行了系统审计。通过评估五个主流模型在专业医疗输入下的表现，深入分析了模型在定位失败、格式崩溃及领域适应方面的局限性。研究旨在刻画模型在真实临床失败场景下的行为特征，为构建更值得信赖的医疗AI系统提供了关键的基准和改进方向。
papers.abstract_en: Deploying vision-language models (VLMs) in clinical settings demands auditablebehavior under realistic failure conditions, yet the failure landscape of frontier VLMson specialized medical inputs is poorly characterized. We audit five recent frontier …

papers.title_en: PRISM: Pre-alignment via Black-box On-policy Distillation for Multimodal Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大型多模态模型（LMM）在监督微调（SFT）阶段产生的分布偏移问题，提出了PRISM框架。该框架通过黑盒在线策略蒸馏进行预对齐，旨在强化学习（RLVR）之前优化模型策略。PRISM利用高质量黑盒模型的反馈，在保持策略一致性的同时提升了模型在多模态任务中的表现，为LMM的后训练流程提供了一种更高效的对齐方案。
papers.abstract_en: The standard post-training recipe for large multimodal models (LMMs) appliessupervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated demonstrations followed by reinforcementlearning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). However, SFT introduces distributional drift …
